hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -q 'git commit' && jq -n --rawfile c "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/pre-commit-checklist.md" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:("Pre-commit checklist (.claude/hooks/pre-commit-checklist.md):\n" + $c)}}' || true
